arts.ttl: BFW 2025 Hot Takes: Bayern Munich youngster Jonah Kusi-Asare has the potential to be the successor to Harry Kane
arts.sum: But it is also important to identify talent when one has it and Kusi-Asare has so much of it that he has the potential to replace even a player as good as Kane one day. In the January of 2023, the Bavarians signed striker Jonah Kusi-Asare for an initial €4 million with another €2.5 million in potential add ons.

arts.ttl: RB Salzburg vs. Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, injuries, & more!
arts.sum: Picking up right where they left off, Bayern will start the year with a friendly against the Austrian version of the Red Bull family, RB Salzburg. Based on his recent conversation with Vincent Kompany, Mathys Tel might play the entire 90 minutes by starting at left wing and moving up to forward to relieve Harry Kane.

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich lurking in the background of Florian Wirtz negotiations with Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: According to a report from Sport Bild, Bayern Munich is staying closely tied to Florian Wirtz as he works through negotiations with Bayer Leverkusen. Also, be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Massive Bayern Munich contract update: Why are things taking so long?; Joshua Kimmich and Jamal Musiala want sporting assurances, don’t want to be first to act; Alphonso Davies seizing opportunity with better performances
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is in the midst of several key contract situations with many of the teams foundational players — Joshua Kimmich, Jamal Musiala, and Alphonso Davies chief among them. Bayern have been in talks with both Kimmich and Musiala over a new contract for weeks.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich legend Oliver Kahn is in the process of buying Bordeaux
arts.sum: Where Bayern and Bordeaux converge are consistency and financial success. Bayern Munich is a historic club that has seen countless footballing legends through its doors throughout its lifetime.

arts.ttl: Rummenigge admires the legacy Thomas Müller has built, hints at a career in management for the Bayern Munich legend
arts.sum: Rummenigge then elaborated a little on the legacy the retired Germany international has created and what it could still mean for Müller’s long term future. Former longtime chairman of Bayern Munich, Karl-Heinz Rummenigge, elaborated on just how Müller has become so iconic to the Bavarian giants: “Thomas Müller is a phenomenon for me.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star Ronald Araujo discusses future at Camp Nou with Man United, Bayern Munich admirers of centre-back
arts.sum: Barcelona centre-back Ronald Araujo says that he is "talking with the club" about a new contract but refused to offer any guarantees.

arts.ttl: Michael Olise explains the importance of Bayern Munich’s public training sessions, recounts an experience with one as a kid
arts.sum: Such special moments, encounters and moments of connection are why these public training sessions are so important. With the reduction of public training sessions and some really dour performances in the 2023/24 season, that connection lost a little of its’ lustor and the club has aimed to bring it back.

arts.ttl: Aleksandar Pavlović believes there is still a “long way to go” before Bayern Munich can think about a Champions League final at the Allianz Arena
arts.sum: In any given season Bayern Munich are determined to reach the Champions League final, however, since UEFA confirmed Munich - specifically the Allianz Arena - as the stage for the ultimate round of club football’s premium competition, Die Rekordmeister will be pulling out all the stops to reach it. The Bavarians are just two spots off automatic qualification for the knockout stages, and with a favourable last two fixtures in the league phase, they have every chance to launch a strong charge for a home final at the Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Manchester City sees opening to get Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala; Bayern won’t give up on Florian Wirtz; Liverpool star Mo Salah’s future is open; PSG eyeing Dutch goalkeeper; Omar Marmoush rumors premature?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Citing a lack of progress in contract talks between Bayern Munich and Jamal Musiala, Manchester City might think there is an opening to convince the Germany international to jump ship this summer: Find out how they got involved with Bayern Munich, Bavarian Football Works, what they like, what they’re into, and what they are expecting from the Bavarians this season.
